name: agentprivacy-two-waters
description: Orphic hydrology of the sovereignty lattice — Lethe (the river of forgetting, named Blade 38) and Mnemosyne (the pool of chosen memory, still unnamed). Activates when designing systems where the witness must be held by flow rather than by a still pool, or when distinguishing architectures that "forget by design" from those that "keep by design."
